name: Fudgy Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a 9-inch cake pan with a circle of buttered parchment paper. Wrap the outside of the pan in foil to prevent batter seepage.
2. Preheat oven to 300°F.
3. Melt together the chocolate, butter, and coffee using either the microwave or a double boiler over hot water until smooth and shiny.
4. Add sugar and mix well.
5. Whisk in the eggs one at a time until completely blended.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan and place in the center of the preheated oven.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes. The top will be covered with a crust, but the center will be soft and appear undone.
8. Cool in pan to room temperature, then refrigerate overnight or longer. The cake will solidify into a fudgelike consistency.
9. To remove from pan, loosen edges of pan and invert on plate. Invert again on another plate. Press back any loosened pieces.
10. Serve sprinkled with powdered sugar or covered with whipped cream and chocolate curls. Optionally, spread with raspberry jam before covering with whipped cream.
